<!-- Thanks for contributing. Keep PRs focused: one concept per PR (see CONTRIBUTING.md). -->

## What

<!-- What does this PR change? Link the BUILD_LOG step / ADR if there is one. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation. What problem does it solve or what does it teach? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (new test layer, capability, or CI/CD wiring)
- [ ] Fix (bug or flaky test)
- [ ] Chore / tooling (deps, config, governance)
- [ ] Docs only (ADR, BUILD_LOG, README, ARCHITECTURE)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run format:check` pass
- [ ] Relevant tests pass locally (`npm run test:api`, `test:regression`, etc.)
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (ADR / BUILD_LOG / ROADMAP / README)
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env.example` updated if a new variable was added
- [ ] If this touches the SUT contract, the app side was merged first (see CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything that needs context: trade-offs, follow-ups, things deliberately left out. -->
